Comments will be on the RIGHT side of the diff.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Review comment content in Markdown. For single-line comments, this is the target line. For multi-line comments, this is the ending line.","type":["number","string"]},"path":{"description":"File path relative to the repository root (e.g., 'src/auth/login.js'). Use with pagination parameters to control the number of results returned.\n 5. get_review_comments - Get review threads on a pull request. Each thread contains logically grouped review comments made on the same code location during pull request reviews. 2026-03-30T08:41:51.3463379Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-03-30T08:41:51.3463652Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-03-30T08:41:51.3463807Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-03-30T08:41:51.3464038Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-30T08:41:51.3464393Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-03-30T08:41:51.3464523Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-03-30T08:41:51.3464680Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-03-30T08:41:51.3464780Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-03-30T08:41:51.3464988Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-03-30T08:41:51.3465080Z [36;1mfi[0m
